title: phase-0
description: Vendor selection, lead-time assumptions, pricing decisions, and print-format constraints.

title: phase-1
description: Foundation work across auth, admin setup, storage, CI, and backend persistence.

title: phase-3
description: Template catalog, personalization, and rendering pipeline.

title: phase-4
description: Moments rules, draft generation, scheduling, review, and notification behavior.

title: phase-6
description: Fulfillment integration, shipment creation, and delivery tracking.

title: phase-7
description: Hardening work across GDPR, monitoring, support tooling, and safety requirements.
